'''Yald Sutel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] officer in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. He had a blocky head and by [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] held the rank of [[General/Legends|general]].

That year he was assigned to the [[Battle of Ord Mantell (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Ord Mantell]], placed in command of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces formerly under the command of [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Ark Poinard]]. From the bridge of Poinard's command ship, ''[[Erinnic]]'', the two officers planned the failed defense of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{1st}}
